summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Chrono DMI v2 new features: Light client NIP/Card login, Order reception with scan mode, and FIFO picking with visual indicators. All 54 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified working correctly.
passed_tests: Light client login: NIP mode with numpad (PIN: 1234) - PASSED
Light client login: Card mode toggle and card input (Card: 020e0b5a) - PASSED
Light client login: shake animation on wrong PIN - PASSED (visual verified)
Light client login: success flash on correct PIN - PASSED (visual verified)
Light client login: empty PIN rejected with 400 - PASSED
Light client login: empty card rejected with 400 - PASSED

FIFO suggestions sorted by expiration date (soonest first) - PASSED

Light client picking: location code displayed - PASSED

seed_data_creation: Created FIFO test data: TEST_FIFO_Supplier, TEST_FIFO_Stent product, TEST_FIFO_Cabinet with 3 instances (FIFO-SN-001/002/003) with different expiration dates (30/90/150 days). Intervention created for FIFO picking test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All v2 features are working correctly. Light client has NIP/Card toggle with shake animation on error and green flash on success. Order reception modal has scan-to-fill mode, progress counter, Enter-to-next-field, and copy lot/expiry button. FIFO picking shows priority indicators with expiration days, location codes, and expandable instance list with PRIORITÉ badge. Hardware endpoints remain MOCKED stubs.

light_client_login.nip_mode: Working - numpad input, PIN validation, shake on error, success flash
light_client_login.card_mode: Working - card input field, auto-submit after pause (RFID behavior), manual submit button
light_client_login.mode_toggle: Working - NIP/Carte toggle buttons switch between modes

order_reception.scan_mode: Working - 'Mode scan rapide' section with scan input that auto-fills next empty serial field
order_reception.progress_counter: Working - Shows X/Y rempli(s) in header
order_reception.enter_to_next: Working - Enter key moves focus to next serial input
order_reception.copy_lot_expiry: Working - 'Copier lot/expiration sur tous' button copies first filled lot/expiry to all items

fifo_picking.fifo_suggestions_api: Working - Returns instances sorted by expiration_date ASC with is_priority flag
fifo_picking.priority_indicator: Working - Shows 'Prendre en priorité — expire dans Xj (date)' with color coding
fifo_picking.location_display: Working - Shows cabinet location code (e.g., TEST_Cabinet_A-R2-C1)
fifo_picking.expandable_instances: Working - Click product card to see all available instances
fifo_picking.color_coding: Working - Green (>90 days), Yellow (<90 days), Amber (<30 days), Red (expired)
